title: S3 Bucket
description: Object storage with virtually unlimited capacity. Stores files, static assets, backups, and data lake content. Accessed via IAM policies, not network traffic edges.
practices: Block public access by default. If you need public content, put CloudFront in front of S3.
Enable versioning for any bucket storing important data — accidental deletes become recoverable.
Use lifecycle rules to move infrequently accessed data to S3-IA or Glacier to reduce costs.
Access S3 via IAM policies on your compute resources, not access keys.
configNotes: Bucket name must be globally unique across all AWS accounts.
Versioning is recommended for production buckets.
Access is controlled through IAM, not network edges in WIMCUI.
